stemHtml: What is the effect on induced drag of an increase in aspect ratio?

options.a: Induced drag decreases, because the effect of tip vortices decreases.
options.b: Induced drag decreases, because a larger aspect ratio causes more downwash.
options.c: Induced drag increases, because the effect of tip vortices increases.
options.d: Induced drag increases, because a larger aspect ratio increases the frontal area.
